name: Buckner Gold & Silver Exchange
description_short: Buckner Gold & Silver Exchange is a pawn shop in Dallas, TX buying and selling gold, silver, and other collateral-based items with extended evening hours.
description_long:
Buckner Gold & Silver Exchange operates as a traditional pawn shop located at 2810 Buckner Boulevard in Dallas, Texas. The business is positioned within the collateral-based lending and precious metals retail market, serving the local Dallas community with in-person transactions. Based on available information, the company maintains regular operating hours with extended availability on weekdays and weekends to accommodate customer access.

The business model centers on buying, selling, and potentially lending against precious metals including gold and silver, which are core commodities in the pawn shop industry. This typically includes accepting items as collateral for short-term loans, purchasing used precious metals at market rates, and reselling items to retail customers. The specific range of collateral accepted beyond precious metals cannot be confirmed from available sources.

Operationally, Buckner Gold & Silver Exchange distinguishes itself through consistent weekend hours (10:00 AM - 7:00 PM Saturday) and Sunday availability (11:00 AM - 5:00 PM), making it accessible to customers outside traditional business hours. The business maintains a direct phone line (214) 484-4536 for customer inquiries, and operates from a fixed physical location in the Buckner Boulevard corridor of Dallas.

Consumers should recognize that pawn shops provide quick access to cash against collateral but typically involve high interest rates on loans, immediate loss of personal items upon loan default, and limited consumer protections compared to traditional lending. The precious metals market is volatile, meaning the value of items fluctuates daily. This business is best suited for individuals facing immediate cash needs who own valuable precious metals or other collateral and understand the terms of collateral-based lending.
pros: Open on Sundays (11 AM - 5 PM), accommodating weekend customer access
Extended weekday hours until 7 PM (Mon, Wed-Sat) for working professionals
Direct phone contact available at (214) 484-4536 for pre-visit inquiries
Fixed physical location in Dallas with established street address for customer confidence
Specializes in precious metals market where daily pricing is transparent and market-driven
Immediate cash availability for collateral-based transactions without lengthy approval processes
cons: No website with company information, pricing, loan terms, or interest rates publicly available—only Waze directions page
Collateral-based lending results in permanent loss of personal items if loans default
Precious metals values fluctuate daily, creating risk that collateral value may decrease below loan amount
Pawn loans typically carry significantly higher interest rates than traditional personal loans
Limited transparency on specific services, loan terms, fees, and redemption policies from public sources
best_for: Individuals with gold or silver items who need immediate cash and understand collateral loan risks
Precious metals investors looking to buy or sell bullion at current market rates
Dallas residents seeking weekend or evening access to collateral-based lending options
diagnosis: Buckner Gold & Silver Exchange is best for Dallas residents who own precious metals and need immediate cash against collateral, understanding that pawn loans carry higher costs and require surrendering the item. The major caveat is the complete lack of public information about interest rates, loan terms, fees, and specific policies—consumers should call ahead to verify all terms before using services.
services: Collateral-based short-term loans against precious metals
In-person precious metals evaluation and pricing
Weekend and Sunday hours for customer convenience
Physical retail location for walk-in transactions
